//: Project-scoped MCP servers for uniblox (TODO.md §1.1). Reachability is DEFERRED at Phase 1.1: node/npx is not installed in WSL, and the servers need live services/credentials. Secrets (GitHub PAT, Postgres DSN) go in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored), NEVER here. On this Windows+WSL host each server runs via `wsl -e npx ...`.

github.//: Counters nothing by itself; PRs/issues/CI. Needs GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN (set in settings.local.json).

postgres.//: READ-ONLY Postgres. Point the DSN at a read-only role once the platform DB exists (Phase 7).

docs.//: Context7-style docs server — counters hallucinated/version-drifted Bevy/matchbox/str0m/Rhai APIs. Verify APIs here, never from memory.

playwright.//: Browser E2E for the two WASM builds + capability detection. Needs Playwright browsers installed.
